_meta.author: dev.yadhakim
_meta.title: Interactive Globe
_meta.description: Interactive 3D rotating globe built with pure canvas — zero dependencies. 1,200 Fibonacci-distributed dots form the sphere, glowing arcs connect city markers with traveling light particles, pulsing rings mark locations with labels. Drag to rotate with pointer capture, auto-rotates when idle. Configurable markers, connections, colors, and speed. The demo mirrors the Spline robot layout — dark card, left copy, right interactive 3D.
